Different methods were purposed for reflectance spectra reconstruction from CIE tristimulus values such as principal components analysis. In this study, the training samples were first divided into 3, 6, 9, and 12 subgroups by creating a competitive neural network. To do that, L*a*b*, L*C*h or L*a*b*C*h were introduced to neural network as input elements. In order to investigate the performance of reflectance spectra reconstruction, the color difference and RMS between actual and reconstructed data were obtained. The reconstruction of reflectance spectra were improved by using a six or nine\u2010neuron layer with L*a*b* input elements. \u00a9 2016 Wiley Periodicals, Inc.
